arabic_text:
مولانا عبد المطلب
باب اعلیٰ
فاطمہ بنت عمر (باب الابواب)
باب ادنیٰ
عبد اللہ بن سباح (باب الابواب)
ابو طالب
عبد اللہ
english_text:
Our Master Abd al-Muttalib
Higher Door — Fatimah bint Umar (Door of Doors)
Lower Door — Abdullah bin Sabbah (Door of Doors)
Abu Talib
Abdullah
alt_text: A 3-row × 3-column table centered on 'مولانا عبد المطلب' (Our Master Abd al-Muttalib) at top. Middle row gives his Higher Door (باب اعلیٰ = Fatimah bint Umar as Baab al-Abwaab) on the left and Lower Door (باب ادنیٰ = Abdullah bin Sabbah as Baab al-Abwaab) on the right. Bottom row identifies his two sons: Abu Talib on the left, Abdullah on the right.
notes: Genealogy + spiritual-hierarchy diagram for Abd al-Muttalib: identifies his higher/lower Baab al-Abwaab and his two sons. Pairs with image 027 which extends this pattern across the full prophetic line.
